Unknown rec. Drop between CDr
Great sound



1	Absolutely Sweet Marie
2	I Shall Be Released
3	Tough Mama
4	You Ain't Goin' Nowhere
5	Silvio
6	Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic w band)
7	Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic w band)


8	Cocaine Blues (acoustic w band)
9	God Knows
10	Blind Willie McTell
11	Highway 61 Revisited

13	Forever Young (acoustic w band)
